issues.description: Requested Vitest validation could not be executed in this read-only sandbox: Vitest failed during config loading with esbuild spawn EPERM.
issues.recommendation: Re-run `npm test -- --run src/components/common/dialog.test.tsx src/components/space/avatar-editor-modal.test.tsx src/components/dashboard/delete-space-section.test.tsx` in a writable/non-restricted environment.
issues.deferRationale: Environmental sandbox process-spawn restriction, not a code defect observed in the diff.
